name: testAddAcquirer
description: New Acquirer can be successfully created and its details appear correctly in the acquirers table
descriptionHtml: New Acquirer can be successfully created and its details appear correctly in the acquirers table

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: New Acquirer can be successfully created and its details appear correctly in the acquirers table

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: The 'Add acquirer' dialog is no longer visible
Verify: Acquirer creation success message is displayed
Verify: Acquirer code is 'NGenius' by default
Verify: Acquirer MID MCC matches expected
Verify: Currencies column contains expected currency
Verify: 'System config' cell contains all values in correct order
Verify: The 'Acquirer Display Name Field' is editable
